email_subject: Application for Administrative Project Assistant – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Administrative Project Assistant position at Page Personnel Belgium, as advertised. With a strong background in administration, document control, and project support, I am confident I can contribute effectively to your client's project team in Kallo.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage document flows, track project progress, and ensure accuracy in all deliverables. I am highly proficient in Excel, SharePoint, and Outlook, and I have experience checking documents for compliance and taking corrective actions. My attention to detail and ability to work with multiple programs align perfectly with the requirements of this role.

I am immediately available, have my own transportation, and can easily commute to Kallo daily. I am fluent in English and have a basic knowledge of Dutch (A2, currently taking classes). I am eager to bring my organizational skills and proactive attitude to support your project team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can add value to your client.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Administrative Project Assistant position at Page Personnel Belgium, supporting a project team in the maritime sector. With a solid foundation in administration, document control, and project coordination, I am well-prepared to contribute to your client's sustainability-focused company in Kallo.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client projects simultaneously, ensuring that all documents meet client requirements and are processed accurately through each stage. I regularly use Excel, SharePoint, and Outlook to track progress, communicate with team members, and maintain organized document flows. My experience includes checking documents for compliance, identifying issues, and taking corrective action—skills directly relevant to this role.

I am immediately available and have my own transportation, making the daily commute to Kallo easy. I am fluent in English and have a basic knowledge of Dutch (A2, currently taking classes), which allows me to communicate effectively in a bilingual environment. My attention to detail and ability to work with multiple programs ensure that I can handle the document control responsibilities with precision.

I am drawn to this opportunity because of the potential for growth and the chance to work in a dynamic, sustainability-focused industry. I am eager to bring my organizational skills, proactive attitude, and ability to learn quickly to support your project team.

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience aligns with your needs.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Proven administrative experience: managing document flows, checking documents for compliance, and taking corrective actions.
Proficient in Excel, SharePoint, and Outlook for tracking, organizing, and communicating project information.
Detail-oriented and accurate, with experience maintaining high standards in fast-paced environments.
Immediately available with own transportation and daily commute to Kallo.
Fluent in English with basic Dutch (A2, in progress); strong communication skills for team coordination.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Administrative Project Assistant
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Detail-oriented administrative professional with experience in document control, project support, and team coordination. At Episto, I manage document flows, check documents for compliance, and take corrective actions to ensure accuracy. Proficient in Excel, SharePoint, and Outlook, with strong organizational skills and the ability to work with multiple programs. Immediately available with own transportation and fluent in English with basic Dutch (A2, in progress). Eager to support a project team in the maritime sector.

CORE SKILLS
- Document control & compliance: checking documents, verifying requirements, taking corrective actions
- Administrative support: managing document flows, tracking progress, coordinating with team members
- Software: Excel, SharePoint, Outlook, Google Workspace
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Attention to detail, accuracy, problem-solving

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage document flows for client projects, ensuring all documents meet client requirements and are processed accurately through each stage
- Check documents for compliance and take necessary corrective actions when issues are detected
- Use Excel, SharePoint, and Outlook to track project progress, communicate with team members, and maintain organized records
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with analytics tools to guide decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site, managing full project lifecycle from structure to launch
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations to improve visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
